headline: A Look At Cummins (CMI) Valuation After Upgraded Outlook And Data Center Growth
summary: Why Cummins Stock Is Back on Investors’ Radar Cummins (CMI) is attracting fresh attention after reporting first quarter results that topped revenue and earnings estimates, and it raised its 2026 outlook for both revenue growth and EBITDA margin. The company now expects full year 2026 revenue to be up 8% to 11%, supported by strong demand for power generation tied to data centers, even as North American heavy and medium duty truck markets remain softer. At the same time, Cummins exited its low...
